name: Script → Is Running
description: This [condition](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-conditions) allows you to check if a given script is running. In case scripts are run in `parallel`, this condition only tells you if at least one script of the given id is running, not how many. Not designed for use with [while](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#while_action); instead try [script.wait](https://esphome.io/components/script#script-wait_action).
